<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
React overlay: evaluation bar, best-move arrows, on-square move markers, floating action
button, opening-book panel, system-message toasts, and a Settings panel. Move quality uses
11 classifications (book/best/excellent/good/inaccuracy/mistake/blunder/miss/brilliant/
great/forced). Gated UI (upgrade CTAs, trial banners) is unreachable once plan is premium.
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
